page_title: List of warhorses (Attack on Titan 2 Game)
text:
The Warhorse is the player's primary means of ground transportation in Attack on Titan 2 and is only usable on certain maps. Such maps are usually those taking place outside an inhabited district. They are rated by Speed (how fast they can go) and Stamina (how long they can run at full speed).
 There are two warhorse vendors in the game; one located at the Regiment Store, and the Farming Village.
